title: Visual Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury fashion brand visual system for Maison Valeur. Layout Type: couture magazine cover, built like a real premium editorial asset. Collection: Winter Silk Architecture; product focus: structured ivory coat, silk scarf, sculptural earrings, and leather gloves. Model Direction: adult model in side-profile crop with calm architectural posture, styled to support the product and brand tone. Brand Mood: quiet luxury, minimal, restrained, expensive; palette: ivory, black, smoked silver, and a single wine-red accent. Typography: Include WINTER SILK / ARCHITECTURE OF LIGHT / ISSUE 01 as refined editorial text with strong hierarchy and clean spacing. Composition: Art-directed crop, negative space, product detail modules if useful, premium magazine/brand campaign polish. Restrictions: Fictional or approved brand only, no copied logos, no random text, no chaotic collage, no distorted product or model anatomy.
